description_long: This is a classic playground merry-go-round featuring a circular platform with six evenly spaced yellow seats, each equipped with green metal safety bars for support and security. The central axis is a sturdy green metal pole, from which six radial arms extend outward, connecting to the seats and forming the main structure. The base platform is a dark brown, likely metal or composite, designed to be durable and weather-resistant. The green metal framework provides both structural integrity and handholds for children to grip while the equipment spins. The seats are slightly contoured for comfort and are positioned above the platform, allowing users to sit securely while the merry-go-round rotates. The overall design prioritizes safety with the inclusion of guardrails and a stable, low-to-the-ground profile.
description: A circular, green-and-yellow merry-go-round with six seats and safety bars, built on a sturdy brown platform. The structure features a central pole and radial arms for spinning.
description_view_0: Front view showing three yellow seats with green safety bars and the central green pole clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the radial symmetry of the six seats and the connecting green arms.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with three seats and the central pole, emphasizing the circular arrangement.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the opposite side's seats and the overall round structure.
